children.cn: 大明的竞赛
比赛开始

children.text: Daming went to a hill with his friends and they had a race.
children.cn: 大明和他的朋友们去了一座小山，他们进行了一场比赛。
children.notes: went: go的过去式；had a race: 进行了一场比赛
children.statement: had a race 意思是“进行了一场比赛”。
children.explanation: have a race 的过去式是 had a race，表示过去发生的比赛行为。

children.text: At first, he was at the front.
children.cn: 起初，他跑在最前面。
children.notes: at first: 起初；at the front: 在最前面
children.statement: at first 在句中表示“起初，开始”。
children.explanation: at first 表示事物或情节的起初阶段。

children.cn: 捡起垃圾
然后，他看到了一些垃圾。
children.notes: saw: 看见（see的过去式）；rubbish: 垃圾

children.text: So, he stopped and picked it up.
children.cn: 所以，他停下来并把它们捡了起来。
children.notes: stopped: 停止（stop的过去式）；picked up: 捡起
children.statement: picked it up 中的 it 指代上句的 rubbish。
children.explanation: rubbish 是不可数名词，所以用单数人称代词宾格 it 来指代它。

children.cn: 真正的赢家

children.text: In the end, he was the last one to get to the top of the hill, but his friends thought he was the real winner.
children.cn: 最后，他是最后一个到达山顶的人，但他的朋友们认为他才是真正的赢家。
children.keywords: in the end, last one, real winner
children.notes: in the end: 最后，终于；real winner: 真正的赢家
children.statement: 大明虽然最后到达，但朋友们依然佩服他。
children.explanation: 因为大明停下来捡垃圾，虽然比赛输了，但他的优秀品质让朋友们觉得他是真正的赢家。

children.cn: 奇怪的一周
丢东西

children.text: This week, something strange happened in Daming's family.
children.cn: 本周，大明家里发生了一些奇怪的事情。
children.notes: happened: 发生（happen的过去式）；strange: 奇怪的
children.statement: happened 是规则动词的过去式形式。
children.explanation: happen 是规则动词，过去式直接在词尾加 ed 变为 happened。

children.text: At first, Mum lost her ring.
children.cn: 起初，妈妈丢了她的戒指。
children.notes: lost: 丢失（lose的过去式）；ring: 戒指
children.explanation: lose 的过去式是不规则变化 lost。

children.text: And then, Dad lost his car key.
children.cn: 然后，爸爸丢了他的车钥匙。
children.explanation: 根据句子，爸爸丢的是车钥匙 (car key)，而不是家门钥匙。

children.cn: 接下来，大明丢了他的硬币。
真相大白

children.text: Daming looked around carefully and saw something shiny in the bird's home!
children.cn: 大明仔细地环顾四周，看到鸟巢里有闪闪发光的东西！
children.notes: look around: 环顾四周；carefully: 仔细地；shiny: 闪亮的
children.explanation: carefully 是副词，用来修饰动词短语 looked around，其形容词形式为 careful。

children.text: Aha, the bird took all things away.
children.cn: 啊哈，鸟儿把所有的东西都拿走了。
children.notes: took away: 拿走（take away的过去式）
children.statement: took 是 take 的过去式。
children.explanation: take 的过去式是不规则变化 took。

children.cn: 共同成长
我有一个小弟弟。
children.explanation: 文中明确说是弟弟 (little brother)，而不是妹妹 (little sister)。

children.cn: 婴儿时期

children.text: When he was ten months old, he cried a lot and I was not happy.
children.cn: 当他十个月大时，他经常哭，我很不开心。
children.notes: ten months old: 十个月大；cried: 哭（cry的过去式）；a lot: 经常，非常
children.explanation: 以辅音字母加 y 结尾的动词，变过去式时需改 y 为 i 再加 ed。

children.cn: 儿童时期

children.text: When he was five, we played football together.
children.cn: 当他五岁时，我们一起踢足球。
children.notes: play football: 踢足球；together: 一起
children.statement: 弟弟五岁时，他们一起打篮球。
children.explanation: 文中提到的是踢足球 (played football)，而不是打篮球 (played basketball)。

children.cn: 现在

children.text: Now he is ten, we go to the same school and we help each other.
children.cn: 现在他十岁了，我们在同一所学校上学，并且我们互相帮助。
children.keywords: ten, same school, help each other
children.notes: same school: 同一所学校；help each other: 互相帮助
children.statement: 他们现在在不同的学校上学。
children.explanation: 文中明确说 'we go to the same school'（我们在同一所学校上学）。

children.text: It's great to grow up with him!
children.cn: 和他一起长大真是太棒了！
children.statement: 这句句子表达了作者开心和温馨的情感。
children.explanation: 作者觉得和弟弟一起成长是一件很棒的事情 (great)。
